message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in closures.zig and generator.zig

- closures.zig: analyzeNestedFunctions - add orelse_body for for_stmt/while_stmt, add else_body for try_stmt, add with_stmt and match_stmt handlers
- generator.zig: isFunctionAliasRecursive - add orelse_body for for_stmt/while_stmt, add else_body for try_stmt, add with_stmt and match_stmt handlers
